an10.174:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, the destruction of life, I say, is threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.2: Taking what is not given, I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.3: Sexual misconduct, I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.4: False speech, I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.5: Divisive speech, I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.6: Harsh speech, I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.7: Idle chatter, I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.8: Longing,I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.9: Ill will, I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
an10.174:1.0.10: Wrong view, I say, is also threefold: caused by greed, caused by hatred, and caused by delusion.
